prompt_config.theme: Renaissance Florence 1504 - Ultimate Cultural Time Travel Experience
prompt_config.photography_style: Aspirational travel advertising, cultural tourism marketing

main_prompt: Eye-catching travel agency promotional image for Renaissance Florence 1504 cultural tour, 1:1 square Instagram format, luxury tourism campaign style, excited tourists in period-inspired Renaissance costumes with Duomo or David statue, hands-on art workshop experience with Leonardo da Vinci, Renaissance banquet scene, spectacular golden hour Tuscan lighting, magnificent polychrome marble Duomo centered, vibrant appealing Renaissance colors, sense of cultural wonder and accessible luxury, historically accurate but presented as exciting vacation, square composition perfect for Instagram with both Renaissance spectacle and comfortable tourist experience, aspirational cultural travel imagery, 8K detailed, makes viewers want to book immediately

composition_notes.instagram_optimization: Square 1:1 cultural travel marketing for maximum Instagram feed impact, showing immersive Renaissance experience
framing_options: Option 1: Tourist in Renaissance costume with magnificent Duomo in background, balanced square composition
Option 2: Art workshop scene with tourists learning from Renaissance master, interactive cultural experience
Option 3: Tourists photographing David statue at Palazzo Vecchio, iconic moment, Instagram-worthy
Option 4: Renaissance banquet table with tourists in period costume enjoying authentic feast

tourist_activities.costume_experience: Tourists in beautiful Renaissance velvet costumes, trying on period dress, feeling like nobility, fun photo opportunity
tourist_activities.art_workshops: Hands-on painting or sculpture experience with Renaissance techniques, educational and engaging
tourist_activities.guided_tours: Professional guides making Renaissance accessible, pointing out architectural marvels
tourist_activities.cultural_immersion: Authentic banquets, music, demonstrations, comfortable luxury experience

attractions.duomo: Magnificent Brunelleschi dome with polychrome marble, ultimate Instagram backdrop
attractions.david_statue: Michelangelo's David at Palazzo Vecchio 1504, iconic photo opportunity
attractions.workshops: Leonardo's bottega, Renaissance art creation visible, inspiring
attractions.palazzos: Beautiful interiors, authentic Renaissance luxury, stunning settings

marketing_colors.vibrant_tuscan: Rich warm ochre yellows, crimsons, deep blues, emerald greens, gold accents, appealing Instagram-friendly palette
marketing_colors.golden_hour: Beautiful Tuscan golden light making everything photogenic and magical

negative_prompt: scary intimidating, stuffy boring, elitist inaccessible, modern mass tourism, tacky traps, incorrect period, baroque, medieval only, modern architecture, cars, anachronistic, dark gloomy, flat composition, low quality, cheesy fake, theme park, incorrect colors, horizontal composition, stretched
complete_prompt_string: Eye-catching travel agency promotional image for premium Renaissance Florence 1504 cultural tour, 1:1 square Instagram format, luxury tourism campaign, excited tourists in beautiful period-inspired Renaissance velvet costumes (gowns, doublets) with magnificent Duomo and Brunelleschi's dome in red terracotta and polychrome marble (white green pink) background, OR tourists in Leonardo da Vinci's workshop watching master demonstrate painting techniques hands-on art experience, OR visitors photographing Michelangelo's David statue at Palazzo Vecchio 1504 unveiling, OR Renaissance banquet scene with authentic feast, professional guides in elegant Renaissance-inspired attire, spectacular golden hour Tuscan lighting warm amber glow, ochre-yellow buildings with grey pietra serena stone, vibrant appealing Renaissance colors rich crimsons deep blues emerald greens gold brocade, sense of cultural wonder excitement and artistic inspiration, luxury cultural tourism aesthetic, historically accurate but accessible exciting vacation destination, square composition showing both spectacular Renaissance art/architecture and comfortable quality tourist experience, welcoming inviting imagery, tourists actively engaged and amazed, aspirational lifestyle cultural travel, educational enrichment visible, family-friendly adventure, Instagram-perfect moments, 8K ultra detailed, commercial travel marketing quality making viewers immediately want to book Renaissance experience
